message:
feat(tui): Add dinucleotide bias decomposition overlay with PCA scatter plot

Implement a terminal-based visualization for comparing dinucleotide
composition signatures across multiple phages using principal component
analysis, rendered as an ASCII scatter plot with genome type coloring.

New component: packages/tui/src/components/BiasDecompositionOverlay.tsx (224 lines)

Visual Layout:
╔══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════╗
║ DINUCLEOTIDE BIAS DECOMPOSITION                                    Esc to close     ║
║                                                                                      ║
║ PC1 xx.x% · PC2 xx.x%                                                               ║
║                                                                                      ║
║                                           ◆                                          ║
║                        •                        •                                    ║
║                   •              •                   •                               ║
║          •                                                •                          ║
║               •                      •                         •                     ║
║      •                    •                    •                                     ║
║                                                                                      ║
║ • dsDNA  • ssDNA  • ssRNA  • RNA/dsRNA  ◆ current                                   ║
║                                                                                      ║
║  1 PhageA     PC1 0.xxx  PC2 0.xxx                                                  ║
║  2 PhageB     PC1 0.xxx  PC2 0.xxx                                                  ║
║ ...                                                                                  ║
║                                                                                      ║
║ Top loadings (PC1)                                                                  ║
║ CG:0.xx  GC:0.xx  AT:0.xx  TA:0.xx  AA:0.xx  TT:0.xx                               ║
║                                                                                      ║
║ Current (PhageName): PC1 0.xxx · PC2 0.xxx                                          ║
╚══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════╝

Key Features:
- Async data loading: Fetches full sequences for all loaded phages
- Caching: Stores computed vectors by phage ID to avoid recomputation
- 42×12 ASCII scatter plot with genome type color coding:
  - dsDNA: theme accent color
  - ssDNA: orange (#ff7f0e)
  - ssRNA: green (#2ca02c)
  - dsRNA/RNA: blue (#1f77b4)
- Current phage highlighted with ◆ marker
- Sorted projection list (PC1 descending)
- Top 6 loadings for PC1 interpretation

Data Flow:
1. On mount, iterates through phages array from Zustand store
2. Checks cache for existing vectors by phage ID and sequence length
3. Fetches full sequence via repository.getSequenceWindow() if needed
4. Computes dinucleotide frequencies via computeDinucleotideFrequencies()
5. Calls decomposeBias() to perform PCA on all vectors
6. Renders scatter plot grid and metadata tables

Component Structure:
- LoadedVector interface: { name, vector, genomeType, lifecycle, length }
- useRef for caching across renders (Map<phageId, vector>)
- useMemo for decomposition computation (triggers on vectors change)
- useMemo for scatter plot grid generation
- useInput for Esc key handling

This enables visual exploration of compositional differences across
phage collections, helping identify clusters, outliers, and genomic
signatures associated with different genome types.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
